title: Sr. Data AI Engineer
company_focus:
AI, automation, cloud engineering, and advanced analytics
for business transformation
description:
Company Description

About Sutherland Artificial Intelligence. Automation. Cloud
engineering. Advanced analytics. For business leaders, these
are key factors of success. For us, they’re our core
expertise.

We work with iconic brands worldwide. We bring them a unique
value proposition through market-leading technology and
business process excellence. We’ve created over 200 unique
inventions under several patents across AI and other
critical technologies. Leveraging our advanced products and
platforms, we drive digital transformation, optimise
critical business operations, reinvent experiences, and
pioneer new solutions, all provided through a seamless “as a
service” model.

For each company, we provide new keys for their businesses,
the people they work with, and the customers they serve. We
tailor proven and rapid formulas to fit their unique DNA. We
bring together human expertise and artificial intelligence
to develop digital chemistry. This unlocks new
possibilities, transformative outcomes and enduring
relationships. Sutherland Unlocking digital performance.
Delivering measurable results.

Job Description

Core Responsibilities

- Develop and optimize SQL pipelines, data models, and
  transformations within Snowflake.
- Build Python-based data processing and automation workflows.
- Contribute to Agile ceremonies and deliverables, ensuring
  timely and high-quality outputs.
- Implement CI/CD workflows and maintain version-controlled
  code repositories.
- Build and manage orchestration pipelines using Airflow,
  Dagster, or similar tools.
- Support data governance, quality checks, and secure data
  practices.
- Troubleshoot pipeline issues and proactively improve
  performance and reliability.

Qualifications

Required Skills

- Strong SQL expertise (5+ years), preferably with Snowflake,
  but other Database Management systems are acceptable.
- Data modelling experience.
- Proficient Python programming skills for pipeline and
  automation tasks.
- Experience working in Agile environments and delivering
  iterative outcomes.
- Understanding of cloud data warehouses, especially
  Snowflake.
- Familiarity with CI/CD processes and tools (e.g., GitHub,
  GitLab, Azure DevOps).
- Exposure to workflow orchestration frameworks like Airflow
  or Dagster.

Additional Information

All your information will be kept confidential according to
EEO guidelines.
responsibilities: Develop and optimize SQL pipelines, data models, and transformations within Snowflake
Build Python-based data processing and automation workflows
Build and manage orchestration pipelines using Airflow, Dagster, or similar tools
Implement CI/CD workflows and maintain version-controlled code repositories
Support data governance, quality checks, and secure data practices
Troubleshoot pipeline issues and proactively improve performance and reliability
use_cases: Data pipeline development and optimization for AI initiatives
Cloud data warehouse operations and data modeling
Automated data processing and ETL workflows
ai_classification_reasoning:
This is a data engineering role focused on building data
pipelines, SQL transformations, and orchestration workflows
using Snowflake, Python, and Airflow. The role supports
AI/ML initiatives by providing data infrastructure and
processing capabilities, but does not involve building,
training, or deploying AI/ML models directly.
